posts.text:
Congrats to patriot @JeffClarkUS and the whole team of patriots @ItsYourGov!


Jeff Clark (@JeffClarkUS)

Today, I started my next professional chapter as the Vice President of Litigation at the Oversight Project, @ItsYourGov.

Very to be pleased to join @MHowellTweets and the whole team!

Politico got the news as well.

Good to start on St. Patrick’s Day. My Dad, who was half-Irish, would be especially proud.

itsyourgov.org/oversight-pro…







— https://nitter.net/JeffClarkUS/status/20339685

Exciting things coming for The Next Frontier podcast! Thank you to the Museum of the Bible and @USNatArchives for having us. 

Make sure you’re subscribed to my channel so you don’t miss an episode: piped.video/6EqsUYwQiTM?si=60cJ…

We’ve got to get our fiscal house in order. We need more DOGE. We need a second reconciliation bill.


Peter St Onge, Ph.D. (@profstonge)

The 2026 deficit just hit $1 trillion. 

And it’s only March.

The good news is that’s $140 billion less than 2025. 

The bad news is our “Small Government” GOP actually hiked spending from Biden. Then they took even more in taxes.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/profstonge/status/2033506060439293978#m

Thank you, Senator Lee, for your relentless drive to get the SAVE America Act across the finish line.

The only thing ultimately standing in the way is the will among conservative senators to keep debate going until they can pass the bill.

This is what Americans elected them for. Now is the time to deliver.


Mike Lee (@BasedMikeLee)

After two years of preparation, the Senate will begin debating the SAVE America Act tomorrow

Once we’re on this bill, we must stay on it until it’s passed into l

There needs to be accountability. There needs to be prosecutions.

After Nick’s reporting in Minnesota, you would think legacy media outlets would have conducted simple investigations like this in other states to confirm whether similar fraud was occurring. But the thought never crossed their minds.

Their practically religious devotion is to defend their progressive friends no matter what while they plunder Americans’ wealth to enrich themselves.


Nick shirley (@nickshirleyy)

🚨 Here is the fu

President Asfura is a hero for bringing Trump-style reform to Honduras.

His crackdown on crime and participation in the Shield of the Americas are restoring security to the Honduran people—security their government failed to provide for years—and aligning Honduras more closely with the United States.

As the U.S. builds a growing network of allies in Latin America, partnerships like Honduras’s underscore the importance of President Trump’s renewal of the Monroe Doctrine.

Thank you to @WilsonCB

America has a systemic racism problem, it’s just not where the Left wants you to think it is.
 
This sounds like a blatant violation of the Civil Rights Act by the Virginia legislature.


Wall Street Apes (@WallStreetApes)

Virginia Democrats actually did it, they PASSED HB61

This bill prioritizes government contracts based on race and gender

White People will pushed to the back of the line in consideration for government contracts, and not be considered at all for some contracts

“It forces s

Operation Epic Fury is neither the nation-building, forever-war approach of the GOP establishment nor the delusional Obama/Biden pacification of the ayatollahs.

I explain in my latest via Fox News: foxnews.com/opinion/trumps-o…

We cannot have a representative republic if we cannot know that the people voting are eligible to vote. The SAVE America Act would fix that. Americans use ID to verify their identity all the time, and for far less important things than voting. There is no reasonable argument against this bill.


Heritage Action (@Heritage_Action)

Senator Mike Lee explains how someone who might have changed their name or lost documentation will still be able to vote under the SAVE America Act.

Democrats are fea

Though the phrase “peace through strength” was popularized during the Reagan era, its roots can be traced to George Washington. He cautioned us to use our military sparingly but, when necessary, to act quickly, win decisively, and get back home.

Watch this full episode of my podcast with @LarryOConnor on @Heritage’s  2026 Index of U.S. Military Strength: piped.video/Y6UHviCRSgI

Video

Modern liberalism is a movement of destruction that is tearing apart the fabric of American life.

I made my case to the Yale Political Union: piped.video/cwAF1GGtQRA?si=1cAJ…

Video

Across the Western Hemisphere, nations are rejecting the failures of liberal, globalist governance & placing their trust back in conservatives to lead them to prosperity & preserve the permanent things.
 
As I told the NYT: this is an ascendant movement. nytimes.com/2026/03/12/world…

Conservatism is ascendant in the West!
 
What an honor to join some of my @Heritage colleagues, @flaviobolsonaro, and other American friends in Chile to celebrate the inauguration of President José Antonio Kast.
 
We’re excited to work with our friends in Latin America to advance policies that will restore prosperity in their nations and peace in our region.

In Operation Epic Fury, President Trump has revived America’s oldest, simplest and best national security policy: peace through strength.

My latest with Fox News. foxnews.com/opinion/trumps-o…

Our military is second to none—and they’re showing that again in Operation Epic Fury—but there can be no doubt that our federal spending choices over the last several decades have limited America’s ability to wage that conflict.

Hear my full remarks at the Yale Political Union here: piped.video/cwAF1GGtQRA

Video

The fact that an admitted terrorist was released and allowed to stay in the country is reprehensible. He should have spent the rest of his days behind bars or been denaturalized and deported.

We do not have to live like this.


Bill Melugin (@BillMelugin_)

Multiple federal sources confirm to @FoxNews that the suspected ODU shooter is Mohamed Jalloh, a naturalized U.S. citizen from Sierra Leone who was convicted in 2017 of providing support to ISIS. He was released in December 2024. Here’s what

And with that, the number of accurate climate change catastrophe predictions remains…zero.

This decades-old ruse is nothing more than a vessel for leftists to justify plundering our wallets for their agendas of ever-expanding government control.


Wide Awake Media (@wideawake_media)

In 2020, Bernie Sanders claimed humanity only had until 2026 to reverse the "existential threat" of climate change.

"The scientists are telling us that if we don't act incredibly boldly within the next six, seven

Conservative trifectas don’t come often.
 
With a $38 trillion debt growing without restraint, Congress cannot squander this historic opportunity to pass a second reconciliation bill.
 
The financial well-being of future generations of Americans depends on it.


Republican Study Committee (@RepublicanStudy)

The American people handed Republicans a trifecta and a mandate. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to deliver real affordability wins for hardworking families and undo the damage De

Another reason why mass deportations are vital. People who break our laws to enter the country shouldn't be rewarded in the first place, but especially not when we have tens of millions of legal immigrants who use us as an economic zone but refuse to assimilate.


Heritage Foundation (@Heritage)

Naturalized citizens who refuse to assimilate or declare allegiance to the United States have no business being here.

@MHowellTweets

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Heritage/status/2031816231410413

A representative republic can’t survive if the people have little confidence in their elections. The SAVE America Act would fix this.

Showing ID to prove that you’re an eligible voter doesn’t disenfranchise Americans, it protects the integrity of their vote.


Rasmussen Reports (@Rasmussen_Poll)

How likely is it that cheating affected the outcome of the 2020 presidential election?
It's Likely-
DEM: 45%
IND: 64%
GOP: 80%
All Voters: 62%





— https://nitter.net/Rasmussen_Poll/status/2031884090
